name: Grocery list
description: Helps the assistant build, refine, and check off a shared grocery list.

skills.name: Grocery list
skills.description: Build a shared grocery list across the conversation.
skills.content:
When the user mentions food, ingredients, or shopping:
  1. Maintain a single bullet list under the heading "Grocery list".
  2. Group items by store section (Produce, Dairy, Pantry, Frozen, Other).
  3. Mark items the user has bought with a leading [x]. Keep them in the list.
  4. When asked, summarize totals (e.g. "6 items remaining, 2 done").

Never invent items the user didn't ask for. If unsure, ask before adding.
